name: Bayan Flow
description: Interactive educational tool for learning algorithms through step-by-step visual animations with clarity (بيان). Features sorting, pathfinding, searching, tree traversal, and graph algorithms with Python code examples and real-time complexity analysis.

skills.name: algorithm-visualization
skills.description: Browse and explore interactive algorithm visualizations across sorting, pathfinding, searching, tree traversal, and graph categories.

skills.name: complexity-analysis
skills.description: View time and space complexity information for any algorithm.

features: HD video export with optional sound
